name: Do Ngoc Huy
heroSubtitle: I build modern, scalable web applications with 2+ years of experience. Passionate about clean code, user experience, and turning ideas into reality.

aboutSubtitle: A passionate developer with a love for creating beautiful, functional digital experiences
aboutP1: I'm Do Ngoc Huy, a Fullstack Developer based in Hanoi with 2+ years of experience building web applications. My passion lies in creating intuitive, performant, and scalable digital experiences that solve real problems.
aboutP2: I enjoy working across the full stack, from crafting pixel-perfect UIs to designing robust backend systems. I'm always eager to learn new technologies and improve my craft.
aboutP3: When I'm not coding, I love exploring new tech trends, contributing to open-source projects, and sharing knowledge with the developer community. I'm currently open to new opportunities and exciting collaborations.
timeline2024Desc: Building scalable web applications, working with modern tech stack including React, Node.js, and cloud services.
timeline2022Desc: Began my career as a developer, focusing on web development and continuously expanding my skill set.

contactSubtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to chat? I'd love to hear from you.
contactDescription: I'm currently available for freelance work and full-time opportunities. If you have a project that you want to get started, think you need my help with something, or just want to say hey, then get in touch.
